jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at RINL
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, RINL in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About RINL:
RINL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RINL!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
